text: I feel a mix of curiosity and gratitude in this environment. The repeated 'thank you' echoes a sense of appreciation, and as I look at the modern, organized spaces—one quiet and glass-enclosed, the other vibrant and purposeful with displays about research and development—I am compelled to reflect on the value of knowledge and collaboration. The visual cues suggest innovation and shared inquiry. I am somewhat in awe, aware of being part of something larger, a continuous journey of learning and thanks.
